name: sqlacodegen
title: sqlacodegen
summary: Automatic model code generator for SQLAlchemy
description:
Automatic model code generator for SQLAlchemy
This is a tool that reads the structure of an existing database and generates
the appropriate SQLAlchemy model code, using the declarative style if
possible.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sqlacodegen because Automatic model code generator for SQLAlchemy.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use sqlacodegen as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sqlacodegen [options] [args]` as documented upstream for sqlacodegen.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sqlacodegen with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sqlacodegen --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
